    return key.color == box.color

history.hypothesis:
def predict(key, box) -> bool:
    # Hypothesis: a key opens a box if (and only if) its color matches the box color.
    # Occasional failures may occur due to mechanical issues, even when the color matches.
    return key.color == box.color
